\renewcommand{\maketitle}{}

\vspace*{0.5cm}

\vspace{1cm}

% Eyebrow
{\small\sffamily\bfseries\color{heroCyan}\MakeUppercase{Open-Source Python Toolkit}\par}

\vspace{0.5cm}

% Title
{\fontsize{32}{38}\selectfont\sffamily\bfseries PyApprox User Manual\par}

\vspace{0.2cm}

% Subtitle
{\fontsize{18}{24}\selectfont\sffamily\bfseries\color{heroCyan}%
Uncertainty Quantification for Real-World Decisions\par}

\vspace{1cm}

% Tagline
\begin{minipage}{0.75\textwidth}
\centering
\normalsize\color{white}
Pushing performance while guaranteeing reliability demands expensive
simulations and observational data. \textbf{PyApprox} gives engineers and
scientists the mathematical tools to quantify uncertainty, focus resources
where they matter most, and close the gap between ambitious targets and
defensible results --- faster.
\end{minipage}

\vspace{1cm}

% Stats bar
{\large\sffamily\color{heroCyan}80+ Tutorials \quad$\cdot$\quad 11 Topics \quad$\cdot$\quad 2 Backends\par}

\vspace{0.8cm}

% Author
{\Large\sffamily\bfseries John D. Jakeman\par}
\vspace{0.2cm}
{\normalsize\sffamily Sandia National Laboratories\par}
